mapper.insert: insert into visitors (fingerprint, session_id, ip, user_agent, country, province, city, longitude, latitude, first_visit_time, last_visit_time, total_views, is_blocked, expires_at, create_time, update_time) values (#{fingerprint}, #{sessionId}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, #{country}, #{province}, #{city}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{firstVisitTime}, #{lastVisitTime}, #{totalViews}, #{isBlocked}, #{expiresAt}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update visitors set is_blocked = 1, expires_at = date_add(now(), interval 1 day), update_time = now() where id in
#{id}

update visitors set is_blocked = 0, expires_at = null, update_time = now() where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select date(create_time) as date, count(*) as count from visitors where date(create_time) between #{begin} and #{end} group by date(create_time) order by date
select ifnull(province, '未知') as province, count(*) as count from visitors group by province order by count desc limit 10
